response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with ~19 years of software development experience and genuine developer-tooling credentials (test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD infrastructure, MCP code generators), but the role is fundamentally a people-management position and the resume shows no formal people-management or team-leadership experience. There is no evidence of conducting one-on-ones, performance management, roadmap ownership for a team, or leading organizational change, and mobile-platform exposure is limited to a brief iOS/Apple TV stint a decade ago.
strengths: Deep developer-tooling and testing-infrastructure background (Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts, CI/CD, device orchestration)
Far exceeds the 8-year software development experience requirement with broad full-stack and systems depth
Demonstrated knowledge-sharing and mentoring inclination through workshops, courses, and community talks
concerns: No formal people-management experience; all roles are individual-contributor or founder positions
No demonstrated experience leading organizational change or setting team-level roadmaps and performance expectations
Mobile-platform experience is dated and shallow relative to the role's mobile ecosystem focus
